title: security-opt flag for `podman system service`
body:
With `podman run` it's possible to use `--security-opt label=disable` to avoid issues with SELinux. 
However `podman system service` doesn't know the flag. Would it be reasonable to add it?

comments.body: No this is a per container flag, not a service flag.   If you want to disable SELinux by default you can modify containers.conf.
